calendar.matters:
Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar May-28-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Atty. RODRIGO SALAS, Esq. of Shook, Hardy & Bacon LLP (tel: 415-544-1900) for Defendant.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT U-HAUL CO. OF CALIFORNA's Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Stay Proceedings.

Matter not argued/contested. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant's unopposed "motion to compel arbitration and of stay proceedings" is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
